title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Smartr Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Smartr Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Smartr Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Smartr Logistics:
Smartr Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartr Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
